liveIntentIgnored: This planner never sends transactions. Deploys, closes, upgrades, bundles, and retrieves require separate exact approval.

architecture.atomIckk: multi-slot capital window; deployable actuator, not the cash source
architecture.enchancedblock: authority-controlled internal price plus external Orca Whirlpool settlement source
architecture.hopRedeemVault: required bridge from HOP/accounting units to spendable SOL/USDC
architecture.cashRelay: final judge; only SOL/USDC delta after costs passes

deploymentPosition.userClaimAccepted: An unused program can be closed/upgraded/redeployed if its authority and program keypair/data length allow it.
deploymentPosition.deploymentDoesNotChangeCashGate: Deployability removes an engineering blocker, not the HOP redeem/CashRelay proof requirement.

gate2EdgeModel.caveat: This is deterministic planning math only. Cash proof still needs ENCHANCEDBLOCK_GATE_RECEIPT_PATH with simErr=null.

gate3VaultMath.caveat: Modeled income is not booked profit until Gate 4 and CashRelay pass.

gate4RedeemVaultFunded.expectedFirstRun: FAIL when vault is empty or redeem proof is missing.

answers.atomIckk: YES as local/deployable primitive; mainnet executable proof still required before live.
answers.enchancedblock: YES as an external-source design; current positive edge still needs an exact passing gate receipt.
answers.hopRedeemVault: Potentially yes; verify exact burn/redeem receipt and vault balance.
answers.cashRelayInvariant: CashRelay is ready for the provided source.

nextRequiredExactBuild: Deploy or redeploy atom_ickk only behind separate approval; record program ID, pool, maxDeadlineSlots, flash fee, and vault liquidity.
Emit an ENCHANCEDBLOCK no-send source receipt with chosen direction, exact route, simErr=null, positive SOL/USDC post balances, and all costs.
Build or wire a HOP redeem vault receipt: burn/lock HOP -> SOL/USDC from backing vault, with liabilities priced.
Feed the resulting SOL/USDC source receipt into RedemptionCashRelay and require REDEMPTION_CASH_RELAY_READY_NO_LIVE before any live path.
